🛠
Developer Reference
All flows, screens & interactions — click to expand
▼
WorkNest v18 5 Screens 4 Modals 7 Flows
🗺 Reference Maps
Tap to preview the floor plan and seating layout used as the design reference for this prototype.
📱 Screens
S1
Sign In
s-login
SSO entry point. Animated blob background + grid overlay. doSSO() simulates 1.1s auth delay then navigates to Welcome.
S2
Welcome
s-welcome
Personalised greeting with Quick Rebook shortcut and primary CTA to start a new booking. Morphing blob background.
S3
Date & Time
s-datetime
Step 1 of 3. Date chip selector (7 days, weekends disabled) + manual date input. Time slot fixed to 9 AM–6 PM. Next button enabled only after date selection.
S4
Zone Map
s-zones
Step 2–3. SVG floor plan with 6 clickable zones. Selecting a zone opens the seat overlay panel inside the same screen. Seat grid groups seats into pods of 6.
S5
My Bookings
s-bookings
Dashboard with sidebar nav, upcoming & past bookings, favourite seat card, quick rebook, and multi-day booking shortcut. This is the screen you're on now.
🗂 Modals & Overlays
M1
Booking Confirmation
modal-confirm
Triggered by goToConfirm() after seat selection. Shows zone, seat, date, time. Actions: "View My Bookings" → confirmAndGoToDashboard() or "Book Another" → bookAnother().
M2
Quick Rebook
modal-quickrebook
Pre-fills favourite seat (Zone 1 · Z1-07) with today's date. Confirm via confirmQuickRebook() — adds booking card and navigates to dashboard.
M3
Multi-Date Booking
modal-multidate
Week navigator (Mon–Fri chips, past days disabled), seat selector, selected dates preview with remove × per tag. Confirms via confirmMultiDateBooking() creating one card per date.
M4
Modify Booking
modal-modify
Opened by "Modify" button on any booking card via openModifyModal(btn, seat, date). Weekday validation on date input. Saves via saveModifyBooking() — patches card DOM directly.
M5
Find Your Seat
fys-overlay
Reads first upcoming booking card to show zone, seat, time. Displays breadcrumb path (Floor → Zone → Seat), info tiles, and step-by-step walking directions. Uses zoneDirections map.
🔀 User Flows
Flow 1 · Standard Booking
Login
doSSO()
→
Welcome
→
Pick Date
selectDate()
→
Zone Map
selectZone()
→
Pick Seat
selectSeat()
→
Confirm Modal
goToConfirm()
→
Dashboard
confirmAndGoToDashboard()
Flow 2 · Quick Rebook
Welcome / Dashboard
→
Quick Rebook Modal
openQuickRebookModal()
→
Confirm
confirmQuickRebook()
→
Dashboard + Toast
Flow 3 · Multi-Date Booking
Dashboard Sidebar
→
Multi-Date Modal
openMultiDateModal()
→
Select Seat & Dates
toggleMdbDate()
→
Confirm × N cards
confirmMultiDateBooking()
→
Dashboard + Toast
Flow 4 · Modify Booking
Booking Card
→
Modify Modal
openModifyModal()
→
Pick New Date
validateModifyDate()
→
Save
saveModifyBooking()
→
Card DOM updated + Toast
Flow 5 · Cancel Booking
Booking Card
→
cancelBooking(btn)
→
Fade-out animation (0.3s)
→
Card removed + Badge updated + Toast
Flow 6 · Find Your Seat
Sidebar nav
→
openFindSeatModal()
→
Reads first upcoming card → parses zone & seat
→
FYS Modal: breadcrumb + tiles + directions
→
closeFindSeatModal()
Flow 7 · Custom Date Input
Date & Time Screen
→
Type in date picker
selectCustomDate()
→
Weekend? → Toast warn + clear input
→
Weekday → state.selectedDateLabel set → Next btn enabled
🧠 Shared State Objects
state
Global booking state. Holds selectedDate, selectedDateLabel, selectedZone, selectedSeat. Reset by bookAnother().
mdbState
Multi-date booking state. Holds selectedDates (Set of ISO strings), weekOffset (int), seat object. Reset by openMultiDateModal().
zoneData
Static map of zone configs. Each entry: {name, color, seats[]}. Seats built by buildSeats(prefix, count, bookedIdxs).
zoneDirections
Walking directions per zone. Keys: "Zone 1"–"Zone 6". Each: {wing, color, dir}. Used by openFindSeatModal().
_modifyTargetCard
Temp reference to the booking card DOM element being modified. Set by openModifyModal(), cleared by saveModifyBooking().
🐛 Changes in v16
✅
Removed "Add to Calendar" completely — Sidebar nav item, per-card 📅 button, M6 modal, Flow 7, and all related state vars (_calSeat, _calDate) removed.
✅
Removed calendar icon from Past Bookings date tag — Date now shows as plain text with no icon for cleaner past-booking appearance.
✅
Removed 🏠 Home button from dashboard top nav — Redundant since the WorkNest logo already navigates home.
✅
Removed My Profile button from sidebar — No profile page exists; button was non-functional.
✅
Added Log Out button to sidebar bottom — Pinned to bottom-left of sidebar via flex:1 spacer. Navigates back to s-login (SSO login screen).

You're all set! 🎉

How to get there
1
